# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

export const config = {
  matcher: [
    '/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|robots.txt|sitemap.xml|manifest.json|assets|images|fonts|api/auth).*)',
  ],
}

const AUTH_COOKIE_NAMES = ['auth_token', 'access_token', 'token', 'session']
const LOGIN_PATH = '/login'
const PUBLIC_PATHS = new Set<string>([
  '/login',
  '/signup',
  '/forgot-password',
  '/reset-password',
  '/privacy',
  '/terms',
])

function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  if (PUBLIC_PATHS.has(pathname)) return true
  if (pathname.startsWith('/public')) return true
  return false
}

function isAuthPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return pathname === LOGIN_PATH || pathname.startsWith('/login')
}

function isApiRoute(pathname: string): boolean {
  return pathname.startsWith('/api')
}

function getAuthToken(req: NextRequest): string | null {
  for (const name of AUTH_COOKIE_NAMES) {
    const value = req.cookies.get(name)?.value
    if (value && value.trim().length > 0) return value
  }
  const bearer = req.headers.get('authorization')
  if (bearer && bearer.toLowerCase().startsWith('bearer ')) {
    const token = bearer.slice(7).trim()
    if (token.length > 0) return token
  }
  return null
}

async function verifyTokenWithEndpoint(req: NextRequest, token: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const url = new URL('/api/auth/verify', req.url)
  try {
    const res = await fetch(url, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'content-type': 'application/json',
        authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({ token }),
      cache: 'no-store',
    })
    if (!res.ok) return false
    const data = (await res.json().catch(() => null)) as { valid?: boolean } | null
    return !!data?.valid
  } catch {
    return false
  }
}

async function isAuthenticated(req: NextRequest): Promise<boolean> {
  const token = getAuthToken(req)
  if (!token) return false

  const secret = process.env.AUTH_SECRET
  if (!secret) return true

  const encoder = new TextEncoder()
  const data = encoder.encode(token)
  const key = await crypto.subtle.importKey('raw', encoder.encode(secret), { name: 'HMAC', hash: 'SHA-256' }, false, [
    'sign',
  ])
  const sig = await crypto.subtle.sign('HMAC', key, data)
  const expected = Array.from(new Uint8Array(sig))
    .map((b) => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0'))
    .join('')
  const provided = req.cookies.get('auth_sig')?.value ?? ''
  if (provided && provided === expected) return true

  if (process.env.AUTH_VERIFY_ENDPOINT === '1') {
    return await verifyTokenWithEndpoint(req, token)
  }

  return false
}

function redirectToLogin(req: NextRequest): NextResponse {
  const loginUrl = new URL(LOGIN_PATH, req.url)
  const nextUrl = new URL(req.url)
  const nextPath = nextUrl.pathname + nextUrl.search
  loginUrl.searchParams.set('next', nextPath)
  return NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl)
}

function unauthorizedJson(): NextResponse {
  return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
}

export default async function middleware(req: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname } = req.nextUrl

  if (isPublicPath(pathname)) return NextResponse.next()

  const authed = await isAuthenticated(req)

  if (authed) {
    if (isAuthPath(pathname)) {
      const url = new URL('/', req.url)
      return NextResponse.redirect(url)
    }
    return NextResponse.next()
  }

  if (isApiRoute(pathname)) return unauthorizedJson()
  return redirectToLogin(req)
}
